training_status: High volume athlete doing 2 training sessions daily: strength (4 day upper/lower split) in morning + cardio 3-5 days/week in evening

side_effects.description: Concerned about appetite increase from ipamorelin/CJC blend; notes Reta could mitigate this

protocol_notes: OP is currently running a low dose of Reta and is asking for advice between Tesamorelin vs CJC/ipamorelin blend. Goals are improved recovery, sleep, muscle building, and endurance. Has historically struggled with leanness.
